enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Hey Unnaithaane expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Kaadhal Parisu.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary singers S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Hey Unnaithaane was composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on January 14, 1987.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Hey Unnaithaane, the protagonists express their love and affection through poetic lyrics that resonate with anyone who has experienced romance. The song's soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, enhances the emotional depth conveyed by the singers, S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki. Set against the backdrop of Kaadhal Parisu, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a cherished classic. This song beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love, longing, and connection between two souls.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hey Unnaithaane from Kaadhal Parisu is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu and Ilaiyaraaja's mesmerizing composition. Experience the nostalgia and warmth that this classic brings to every listener.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, where are you from, my dear?
What is the truth that will make youth flourish?
The dream of the one who is noble will come true.
I am the victorious one who will sound the drum of success.
Hey, where are you from, my dear?
Are you me or someone else? Here, there is a big person, a great person.
With sweetness and grace, this person is noble.
He knows all the dances and understands everything, he knows what it means to be awake.
Without knowing, people will just go on, what is the use of that?
Does the peacock know the dance of the swan?
Hey, where are you from, my dear?
What is the truth that will make youth flourish?
The dream of the one who is noble will come true.
I am the victorious one who will sound the drum of success.
Hey, where are you from, my dear?
Come, come, my dear, let’s hold hands and embrace.
The essence of the town can flow and melt away.
If you say it, the flower will bloom, and if you say it, it will flow like honey, it will be great.
What is beautiful is said to be beautiful, is it the desire in the eyes?
Something is like lightning in the heart.
Hey, where are you from, my dear?
What is the truth that will make youth flourish?
The dream of the one who is noble will come true.
I am the victorious one who will sound the drum of success.
Hey, where are you from, my dear?
